text:
Created attachment 160111
Patch to add new OPT_IMPLIES and OPT_PREVENTS to Porter's Handbook

Add documentation to the Porter's Handbook to describe the new OPT_IMLPIES and OPT_PREVENTS macros added to the ports tree in r394573.

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=394573
